# DrMuscat

DrMuscat is an SEO-first healthcare discovery and provider visibility platform for Oman.

Current public routes in this phase:
- /en/om
- /ar/om

Crawler-facing files:
- /robots.txt
- /sitemap.xml

In Phase 4.0C, doctor, center, service, pharmacy, laboratory, and programmatic SEO pages are not yet public.

DrMuscat does not claim MOH verification in this phase.
DrMuscat does not offer AI diagnosis or a symptom checker in this phase.
